channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Was that really Jim Carrey? The internet had thoughts but the quiz has answers
As Trump Out-Putins Putin, Russiaâs Global Influence Erodes
item.description: The conflict in Iran may give Moscow a short-term boost economically and in Ukraine. But it has also shown the limits of Russiaâs partnerships.

item.title: Iran retaliates after Israel strikes Beirut and Tehran as war enters Day 7
item.description: Iran fired missiles toward Israel Friday, Israeli officials say, after Israel launched fresh strikes on Tehran and hit Beirut's southern suburbs overn...

item.title: Kristi Noemâs Firing, and the Boom of American Billionaires
Homegoing service will celebrate civil rights leader Jesse Jackson in Chicago
item.description: Chicago native Jennifer Hudson is among the singers performing at a memorial for the civil rights leader who died last month. Former presidents Bill C...

item.title: The Kalshi and Polymarket CEO feud: They hate each other
item.description: The 20-something billionaires who run Kalshi and Polymarket are battling it out to be the top prediction market company. Observers and former insiders...

item.title: Indonesia to Block Children Under 16 From Social Media
item.description: The ban is to take effect March 28, according to a government minister, but details about how it would be implemented were scarce.

item.title: Why the Pentagon Wants to Destroy Anthropic
item.description: The former A.I. policy adviser to the Trump White House explains why the conflict between Anthropic and the White House is so dangerous.

item.title: Taking the heat. Sauna's popular and there may be health benefits too
item.description: It's an age old practice that's having a moment right now. But is there anything to the health claims? Scientists say sauna is more than hot air.

item.title: As Trump Out-Putins Putin, Russiaâs Global Influence Erodes
item.description: The conflict in Iran may give Moscow a short-term boost economically and in Ukraine. But it has also shown the limits of Russiaâs partnerships.

item.title: 4 Arrested in London on Suspicion of Spying on Jews for Iran
item.description: The police said one Iranian and three British-Iranians were detained as part of a counterterrorism investigation.

item.title: Live Updates: Israel Pummels Beirut, Intensifying Strikes on Hezbollah
item.description: Thousands fled the heaviest Israeli attacks on Lebanonâs capital since a 2024 war with the Iran-backed militia. Israel also said it was hitting Tehran...

item.title: 180,000 New Yorkers May Lose Food Stamp Benefits Under New Work Rules
item.description: Social workers are scrambling to alert recipients and help them find jobs before their aid is eliminated under President Trumpâs sweeping domestic pol...

item.title: Indonesia to Block Children Under 16 From Social Media
item.description: The ban is to take effect March 28, according to a government minister, but details about how it would be implemented were scarce.
